name: wingman/stasis
description: A self-contained caching engine with a swappable adapter model (Local filesystem, APCu, Redis, Memcached), configurable key sharding, tag-based invalidation, PSR-16-compatible method signatures, and atomic increment/decrement counters.

suggest.wingman/cortex: Enables configuration hydration via #[Configurable] attributes and Configuration::find().
suggest.wingman/console: Required by the cache:repair console command.
suggest.wingman/helix: Required for proxy-based adapter integration in Cacher::setAdapter().
suggest.wingman/synapse: Required by the Synapse DI bridge (CacherFactory and Provider).
suggest.ext-apcu: Required by ApcuAdapter for in-memory caching.
suggest.ext-redis: Required by RedisAdapter for distributed caching.
suggest.ext-memcached: Required by MemcachedAdapter for distributed caching.
